infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Clad uses your camera to photograph clothing items for your wardrobe.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Clad accesses your photo library so you can add clothing items from existing photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Clad uses your location to fetch local weather for outfit recommendations.

plugins.photosPermission: Clad accesses your photos to add clothing items.
plugins.cameraPermission: Clad uses your camera to photograph clothing items.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Clad uses your location for local weather data.
